# HyperCubeSphere

> HyperCubeSphere is a security-first, engineer-led B2B technology consulting agency. We deliver strategic software solutions, AI innovation, and cybersecurity for forward-thinking enterprises.

## Services
- AI Engineering: Custom ML models, intelligent automation, NLP, computer vision, predictive analytics, and AI governance
- Software Strategy: Architecture consulting, tech stack selection, system design, roadmap planning, and legacy modernization
- Cybersecurity: Penetration testing, red teaming, zero-trust implementation, SOC 2 & ISO 27001 compliance, incident response
- Cloud Architecture: Multi-cloud strategy, Kubernetes orchestration, Infrastructure as Code, migration planning, cost optimization
- Data Platforms: Real-time pipelines, data mesh architecture, data warehouse design, analytics dashboards, data governance
- Strategic Consulting: CTO advisory, digital transformation strategy, team augmentation, technical due diligence

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2021
- Team size: 6 specialists
- Projects delivered: 50+
- Uptime SLA: 99.9%
- Industries served: Financial Services, Healthcare, Defense & Government, Retail, Technology, Energy
- Countries served: 12+
- Certifications and compliance: Zero-Trust Architecture, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, GDPR
- Available in 14 languages: English, Romanian, German, French, Greek, Ukrainian, Spanish, Turkish, Estonian, Czech, Dutch, Swedish, Italian, Danish
